\tt\mc 

\noindent

\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ % beginning of TeX mode
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \centerline{\bf Towers of Hanoi (Scheme)}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}This program gives an answer to the following famous problem (towers of
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}Hanoi).
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}There is a legend that when one of the temples in Hanoi was constructed,
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}three poles were erected and a tower consisting of 64 golden discs was
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}arranged on one pole, their sizes decreasing regularly from bottom to top.
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}The monks were to move the tower of discs to the opposite pole, moving
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}only one at a time, and never putting any size disc above a smaller one.
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}The job was to be done in the minimum numbers of moves. What strategy for
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}moving discs will accomplish this optimum transfer?
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ % end of TeX mode\hrulefill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \hrulefill\ hanoi.scm\ \hrulefill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }8){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ disc の数 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ disc に関するデータの置き場所\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt\mc \ }(make{\tt -}vector{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }0)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(make{\tt -}vector{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }0)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(make{\tt -}vector{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }0)))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(init{\tt -}array){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ disc に関するデータの初期化\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(do{\tt\mc \ }((j{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }(+{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }1)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((={\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }({\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }j))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }1){\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }0)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }2){\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }0)))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }counter{\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ 移動回数カウンタ \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(print{\tt -}result){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ 結果の表示 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(set!{\tt\mc \ }counter{\tt\mc \ }(+{\tt\mc \ }counter{\tt\mc \ }1))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt\#}{\tt "}){\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }counter){\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt "}){\tt\mc \ }(newline)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(do{\tt\mc \ }((i{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }(+{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }1)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((={\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }3))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}[{\tt "}){\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "})

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(do{\tt\mc \ }((j{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }(+{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }1)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((\textbf{or}{\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }0)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }j))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(newline)))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ disc 移動用ポインタ（インデックス）\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(move{\tt -}one{\tt -}disc{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ 1枚の disc を pole $i$ から\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ pole $j$ に移動する \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }({\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }1))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }j)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }i)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }(+{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }1))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }(vector{\tt -}ref{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }i){\tt\mc \ }0))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(move{\tt -}discs{\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }k){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \underline{\textsf{上から $n$ 枚目までの disc}}を、\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ pole $i$ から pole $j$ に\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ pole $k$ を経由して、移動する\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cond}{\tt\mc \ }(({\tt >}={\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }1)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(move{\tt -}discs{\tt\mc \ }({\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }1){\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }k{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ 関数 {\tt move-discs}の中で、さらに自分自身 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(move{\tt -}one{\tt -}disc{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ {\tt move-discs} が使われている。このような \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(print{\tt -}result){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ 手法は、「再帰的呼びだし」といわれる。 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(move{\tt -}discs{\tt\mc \ }({\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }1){\tt\mc \ }k{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }i))))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ \par\begin{center}\includegraphics[scale=0.3]{hanoi1}\quad\includegraphics[scale=0.3]{hanoi2}\end{center}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ たとえば、関数 {\tt move-discs} を呼び出すことは、
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ 上図のような操作をすることに対応する。\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY)

\noindent
\mbox{}(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }0)

\noindent
\mbox{}(vector{\tt -}set!{\tt\mc \ }ptr{\tt\mc \ }2{\tt\mc \ }0)

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}(init{\tt -}array)

\noindent
\mbox{}(move{\tt -}discs{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }2){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ {\tt ARRAY} 枚の disc をpole 0 から pole 1 に pole 2\hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt ;} \ を経由して、移動する \hfill

\tt\mc
